headline: Canada Rethinks Selling Its Crown Jewel Pipeline
summary: Officials now see TMX as a highly profitable “strategically important asset,” with potential for further expansion

headline: Cheniere Energy Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Record LNG Loadings
summary: LNG expects 2026 consolidated adjusted EBITDA in the range of $7.25-$7.75 billion, revised upward from the previous guidance of $6.75-$7.25 billion.
